title: Build the plan in the right order
intro: A plan is not just SIPs. Put the foundations before the wealth engine.
prompt: Drag these into a sound order for setting up a household plan.

steps.text: Secure adequate health and life cover (Protection)
Build an emergency / near-term cash buffer (Liquidity)

debrief: Protection and liquidity come first so a health scare or income blip does not force you to break long-term investments. Growth is the last pillar, not the first.
